meaning: n.椋庝織,涔犳儻,姘戝痉,閬撳痉瑙傚康
examples: It also captures the social mores of the present day.
Does this fit with the mores of contemporary society?
Values and mores and practices are changing all the time.
L.Fudge cookies climbed 23% this year after Kellogg added Butterfinger and S'mores cream filling.
But my point is that changes in technology do lead to changes in accepted mores.
